titleStmt.title: SII 24.370: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 370. (A.R. No. 98 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, BASE, WEST VERANDAH

summary.p: Fragmentary. Narrates the course of Kṛishṇadēvarāya's expeditions against Addaṅki, Nāgārjuṉakoṇḍa, Vinukoṇḍa and Koṇḍavīḍu, etc., and gives a list of his various charities at many places culminating in a grand gift of the five villages Kiḷiyanallūr, Vīrāntanallūr, Paṉamaṅgalam, Peruṅguḍi, and Muttarasanallūr, made personally to god Raṅganātha to be enjoyed as sarvamānya on the date of his visit to the temple. A share of the offerings is allotted to the line of disciples at the Saṭhagōpajīyar-maṭham. The details of the date of the king's visit viz, Śaka 1438, Dhātu, Makara, ba. 11, Monday is referred to as Māgha ba. 11 in No. 371 below. If Makara is a mistake for Māgha the details may correspond to A.D. 1517, February 16, Monday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ttu koṇṭu Attaṅki viṉukoṇṭai vellam koṇṭai nākāccuṉakkoṇṭai tuṅkiṭa te(ta)varum Itumutalāṉa kirituṟkattil tuṟkkamum Ekatāṭiyile kaik koṇṭu koṇṭaviṭṭil tuṟkkattimele viṭṭu Ilakkai piṭippittu Antatuṟkkamum ko
la koṇṭai kammameṭṭu kaṉakkari caṉtarakiri Itu mutalāṉa teluṅkāṇiya tuṟkkamum Ekatāṭiyāka koṇṭu ciṅñāyāttiṟi poṭṭuṉūrkku Eḻuntaruḷi Aṅke ceyakampamum nāṭṭi makātāṉamum ceytu Aruḷi tirumpi Irācamakentiṟapurattukku Eḻuntaruḷi ciṉṉātevi Ammaṉ
māra virapattiṟarāyaṉaiyum kumāra Amvirapattirattiṉ makaṉ narakari tevvaiyum Irāccūr malluva kāṉṉaiyum Utta kāṉṉaiyum caṉṉiyālu kacavāpāttiṟaṉaiyum pūcapāṭṭi Irācci rācāvaiyum cinātarāca Ilakṣamipatirācaṉaiyum paccimavālacantiṟa makāpāttiṟam Ivarkaḷ mutalāṉa pāttiṟa cāmantaraiyum vaṉṉiyaraiyum civitakaṟaṇamāka piṭittu Avarkaḷukku Avaiyatāṉamum kuṭuttu taṟaṇikoṭa Amarecurattile tulāpuruṣa makātāṉamum paṇṇi Aruḷi tirumpi vicaiyanakarattu
makātāṉamum ceyvittu Aruḷi tirumpi vicaiya nakarattukku Eḻuntaruḷi cuvatti śrī ceyārputaiya cālivākaṉa cakavaruṣam 1000 4 100 3 10 8 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa tātu caṅvaṟc(ā)rattu makara pavuḷa Ekāteci comavārattu nāḷ śrī raṅkattukku Eḻuntaruḷi śrī Iraṅkanāta tevaraiyum cevittu Iraṅkanātaṉukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutu ceytu Aruḷum taḷikai patiṉmuṉṟukku taḷikai Oṉṟukku Amutupaṭi paruppu Amutu neyamutu karuppukkaṭṭi Amutu kaṟi Amutu campāram Erikarumpu
[4 100] Āka poṉ 100 5 10 68 kkut tiruviṭai Āṭṭamāka cetta vaṭakarai maḻanāṭṭu melaimuṟi kiḷiyanallūr Ūr-1-kiḻaimuṟi paṇamaṅkalam Ūr-1- teṉkarai Irācakempira vaḷanāṭu peruṅkuṭi Ūr-1- muttaracanallūr Ūr-1-āka Ūr Añcu Inta Ūrkaḷil nāṉku Ellaikkuḷpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey nattam ceyttalai
cantiṟātittavaraiyum caṟuvamāṉṉiyam Āka naṭakkattakkatāka Iraṅkanātaṉ caṉṉatiyile [ dhārā] pūṟuvam Āka kuṭuttapaṭiyāle Inta Ūr Añcum cantiṟātitta(v)varaiyum caṟuvamāṉiyam Āka Aṉupavittukkoḷḷavum ḷe viṭṭavar viḻukkāṭu taḷikai muṉṟekālum Atiracam 10 3- m caṭakopa cīyar maṭattukku ciḻṣapāramparai Āka śrī vayiṣṇavarkaḷ Amutu ceyya kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭapaṭi Āle kuṭukkavum § piṉṉaiyum śrī raṅganātaṉ tiru Ūñcalil Eṟi Aruḷukaiyil cātti Aruḷa
Piece IThere are two more fragmentary pieces engraved nearby apparently connected with the main record.

tamkaṭa varam I talārigiridurgamum bha ka ḍellaṅkoṇḍa leviṭṭala An=tadurgamum koṇḍu pratāparudṛgajapatirāyan kumāran virabhadrarāyaraiyum kumāra hamvirapātran makan naraharidevavaiyum rāccura mallukha khānnaiyum U
śrīraṅganātharaiyum sevittu raṅganāthan kaku varuṣam
Digital edition of SII 24.370 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
